## Description

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / infrastructure

## Verification

- [ ] `dotnet build -c Release` — 0 errors, 0 warnings
- [ ] `dotnet test -c Release` — all tests pass
- [ ] Test count unchanged / updated in README if changed
- [ ] `README.md` updated if behaviour, API, or counts changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `PROFILES.md` updated if profiles were added/removed
- [ ] CodeQL review completed (if applicable)
- [ ] OCR review completed (if applicable)
